content_en:
Tribulations Have A Harmful Effect On One’s Character, Whereby A Man Will Not Even Be Safe From The Companion He Sits With

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 65

Different Kinds Of Trials Mentioned By The Prophet #3; The Way To Escape From Them Is To Withdraw From Society

Husain Ibn ‘Abdur-Rahmaan Al-Ashja’ee related that he heard Sa’ad Tbn Abee Waqqaas 4 say, “I said, ‘O Messenger of Allah, suppose one enters my home and extends his hand to kill me?’ The Messenger of Allah 4 said, ‘ Be like the son of Adam, and he #3 recited:

66 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

(Ahmad) At-Tirmidhee, who related it as well, said, “This hadith is Hasan.”

The Messenger Of Allah #% Advised That One Should Bear Hardships During Tribulations And That One Should Keep Away From Participating In Evil

Abu Moosa Al-Asharee .& related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Indeed just before the Hour are trials, like parts of the dark, black night. In the morning, one is a believer, and in the night, a disbeliever. And in the night, one is a believer, and in the morning, a disbeliever. The one who is sitting is better than the one who is standing; the one who is walking is better than the one who is seeking them out. Then break your bows, cut your bowstrings, and strike your swords with rocks. And if one is entered upon - i.e. upon one of you ~ then let him be like the better of Adam‘s two sons.” (Abu Daavwood)

‘Abdullah ibn As-Saamit related from Abu Dharr a, who said, “The Messenger of Allah 2g climbed (his mount) and made me sit behind him. He # said, ‘O Aba Dharr, suppose the people are afflicted with extreme hunger, to the degree that you are not able to get up from your bed to go to your Masjid ~ what will you do?’ I said, ‘Allah and His Messenger know best.’ He #& said, ‘ Be patient. O Aba Dharr, suppose that the people are afflicted with extreme death - what will you do?’ I said, ‘Allah and His Messenger know best.’ He 28 said, ‘ Be patient. O Aba Dharr, suppose that people fight among, themselves until the stones of a house are drowned in blood ~ what will you do?’ I said, ‘Allah and His Messenger know best.’ He #€ said, ‘ Sit in your house and lock yourself inside your door.’ I said, ‘And what if | am not left alone, should I take my weapons” He 2% said, ‘Then participate with them in that which they are in, but if you fear that you will be excited or drawn by the beam of your sword, then throw the edge of your robe over your face so that he (ie. your attacker) will draw on himself his sin and your sin.” (Ahmad) Abu Daawood related it through another chain.

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 67

disbeliever; and in the night he will be a believer, but in the morning, a disbeliever. The one who is sitting down during them is better than the one who is standing; the one who is standing is better than the one who is walking; and the one who is walking is better than the one who is seeking them out.” Abu Moosa 4 asked, “And what do you order us to do?” He 2% said, “Be as fixtures in your homes.” (Abu Daawood)

The Messenger Of Allah #4 Informed Us That Some Muslims Will Return To Idol-Worship

Thaubaan related that the Messenger of Allah #% said, “Indeed Allah gathered and folded the earth for me, and I saw the East of it and the West of it. And the Dominion of my nation will reach that which was folded from it!!! And I have been given the two treasures — the red (gold) and the white (silver). And [ asked my Lord to not have my nation destroyed by a pervasive drought and to not give an enemy, from other than their own selves, reign over them by (allowing them) to uproot their Baidah (their society and their core place of rule)". And indeed my Lord ‘Azza wa Jal! (to Him belongs Might and Majesty) said, ‘O Muhammad, indeed if I decree a matter, then it is not returned (or prevented). And I have granted you for your nation that I will not destroy them by a pervasive drought and I will not give reign to an enemy, from other than their own selves, over them, (and they will not) uproot their Baidah; (and this) even if those from all areas gather over them (i.e. over the Muslims), so that some of them will destroy one another and imprison one another (i.e. though the two said requests are granted, Muslims will be afflicted by internecine struggles).’ Indeed all that I fear over my nation are misguiding Imams. If the sword is placed in my nation, it will not be raised from them until the Day of Resurrection. And the Hour will not arrive until tribes from my nation betake themselves to the Mushrikeen and until tribes from

( Tmam An-Nawawee said that this indicates how far the Muslim nation will rule from the East and West, which perhaps also indicates that its tule will not extend that much in the North and South.

I Though some areas may be afflicted with a drought, the nation as a whole will not be afflicted with it. Similarly, though enemies may subjugate some Muslim regions, they will not be able to conquer the entire nation.

68 Book of The End: Great Trials and ‘Tribulations

my nation worship idols. And there will be in my nation 30 liars, each one of them claiming that he is a Prophet, but I am the seal of the Prophets; there is no Prophet after me. And a group from my nation will remain victorious upon the truth; those who oppose them will not harm them until the matter of Allah ‘Azza wa Jal (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) arrives (near the Hour the souls of all believers will be taken).” (Ahmad) Through other chains, Muslim, Abu Daawoed, Ibn Maajah, and At-Tirmidhee related it as well. And At-Tirmidhee said about it, “Hasan sahih.”

The Fitnah Of The Saddlebag
content_id:
Fitnah-Fitnah Memberi Dampak Buruk pada Karakter Seseorang, Sehingga Seorang Laki-Laki Pun Tidak Akan Aman dari Teman Duduknya

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 65

Berbagai Macam Fitnah yang Disebutkan oleh Nabi #3; Cara Meloloskan Diri darinya adalah dengan Menarik Diri dari Masyarakat

Husain Ibn 'Abdur-Rahmaan Al-Ashja'ee meriwayatkan bahwa ia mendengar Sa'ad Ibn Abee Waqqaas # berkata, "Aku berkata, 'Wahai Rasulullah, bagaimana jika seseorang masuk ke rumahku dan mengulurkan tangannya untuk membunuhku?' Rasulullah # berkata, 'Jadilah seperti putra Adam,' dan beliau #3 membaca:

66 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

(Ahmad) At-Tirmidhee, yang juga meriwayatkannya, berkata, "Hadith ini Hasan."

Rasulullah #% Menyarankan agar Seseorang Menanggung Kesulitan selama Cobaan dan agar Seseorang Menjauhi Partisipasi dalam Kejahatan

Abu Moosa Al-Asy'aree # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Sesungguhnya tepat sebelum Hari Kiamat akan ada fitnah-fitnah, seperti bagian-bagian dari malam yang gelap gulita. Di pagi hari, seseorang adalah seorang mukmin, dan di malam hari, seorang kafir. Dan di malam hari, seseorang adalah seorang mukmin, dan di pagi hari, seorang kafir. Orang yang duduk lebih baik daripada yang berdiri; orang yang berjalan lebih baik daripada yang mencarinya. Maka patahkanlah busur-busur kalian, potonglah tali-tali busur kalian, dan pukullah pedang-pedang kalian dengan batu. Dan jika seseorang diserang — yaitu salah seorang dari kalian — maka hendaklah ia menjadi seperti anak Adam yang lebih baik." (Abu Daawood)

'Abdullah ibn As-Saamit meriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr #, yang berkata, "Rasulullah #% naik (kendaraannya) dan mendudukkan aku di belakangnya. Beliau # berkata, 'Wahai Abu Dharr, bagaimana jika orang-orang ditimpa kelaparan yang amat sangat, hingga kamu tidak mampu bangun dari tempat tidurmu untuk pergi ke masjidmu — apa yang akan kamu lakukan?' Aku berkata, 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui.' Beliau #& berkata, 'Bersabarlah. Wahai Abu Dharr, bagaimana jika orang-orang ditimpa kematian yang amat sangat — apa yang akan kamu lakukan?' Aku berkata, 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui.' Beliau #8 berkata, 'Bersabarlah. Wahai Abu Dharr, bagaimana jika orang-orang saling berperang hingga batu-batu sebuah rumah terendam dalam darah — apa yang akan kamu lakukan?' Aku berkata, 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui.' Beliau #€ berkata, 'Duduklah di rumahmu dan kunci dirimu di balik pintumu.' Aku berkata, 'Dan bagaimana jika aku tidak dibiarkan sendirian, haruskah aku mengambil senjataku?' Beliau #% berkata, 'Maka ikut sertilah bersama mereka dalam apa yang mereka lakukan, tetapi jika kamu takut bahwa kamu akan tergairahkan atau tertarik oleh kilatan pedangmu, maka tutupkan ujung jubahmu atas wajahmu sehingga ia (yaitu penyerangmu) akan menanggung dosanya dan dosamu.'" (Ahmad) Abu Daawood meriwayatkannya melalui sanad lain.

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 67

kafir; dan di malam hari ia akan menjadi seorang mukmin, tetapi di pagi hari, seorang kafir. Orang yang duduk selama fitnah-fitnah itu lebih baik daripada yang berdiri; yang berdiri lebih baik daripada yang berjalan; dan yang berjalan lebih baik daripada yang mencarinya." Abu Moosa # bertanya, "Dan apa yang engkau perintahkan kepada kami untuk lakukan?" Beliau #% berkata, "Jadilah seperti alat kelengkapan di rumah-rumah kalian." (Abu Daawood)

Rasulullah #4 Memberitahukan Kepada Kita Bahwa Sebagian Kaum Muslimin Akan Kembali kepada Penyembahan Berhala

Thaubaan meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Sesungguhnya Allah melipat dan menggulung bumi untukku, dan aku melihat bagian Timurnya dan bagian Baratnya. Dan Kerajaan umatku akan mencapai apa yang dilipat darinya!!! Dan aku telah diberi dua perbendaharaan — merah (emas) dan putih (perak). Dan aku memohon kepada Tuhanku agar tidak membinasakan umatku dengan kekeringan yang merata dan agar tidak memberikan kekuasaan kepada musuh, selain dari diri mereka sendiri, untuk menghancurkan Baidah mereka (masyarakat dan tempat inti pemerintahan mereka). Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanku 'Azza wa Jal! (kepada-Nya milik Kemuliaan dan Keagungan) berfirman, 'Wahai Muhammad, sesungguhnya jika Aku menetapkan suatu perkara, maka ia tidak dapat dikembalikan (atau dicegah). Dan Aku telah mengabulkan untukmu bagi umatmu bahwa Aku tidak akan membinasakan mereka dengan kekeringan yang merata dan Aku tidak akan memberikan kekuasaan kepada musuh, selain dari diri mereka sendiri, atas mereka, (dan mereka tidak akan) menghancurkan Baidah mereka; (dan ini berlaku) meskipun mereka yang dari semua penjuru berhimpun atas mereka (yaitu atas kaum Muslimin), sehingga sebagian dari mereka akan saling membinasakan satu sama lain dan saling memenjarakan satu sama lain (yaitu meski dua permintaan tersebut dikabulkan, kaum Muslimin akan ditimpa perjuangan internal). Sesungguhnya yang aku khawatirkan atas umatku adalah para Imam yang menyesatkan. Jika pedang diletakkan di (kalangan) umatku, ia tidak akan diangkat dari mereka hingga Hari Kiamat. Dan Hari Kiamat tidak akan tiba hingga kabilah-kabilah dari umatku bergabung dengan kaum Musyrikin dan hingga kabilah-kabilah dari

(Imam An-Nawawee berkata bahwa ini menunjukkan seberapa jauh umat Muslim akan memerintah dari Timur dan Barat, yang mungkin juga mengisyaratkan bahwa kekuasaannya tidak akan meluas sejauh itu di Utara dan Selatan.

Meski beberapa daerah mungkin ditimpa kekeringan, umat secara keseluruhan tidak akan ditimpa olehnya. Demikian pula, meski musuh-musuh mungkin menaklukkan beberapa wilayah Muslim, mereka tidak akan mampu menaklukkan seluruh umat.

68 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

umatku menyembah berhala. Dan akan ada di dalam umatku 30 pendusta, masing-masing mengklaim bahwa dirinya adalah seorang Nabi, tetapi aku adalah penutup para Nabi; tidak ada Nabi setelahku. Dan sekelompok dari umatku akan tetap meraih kemenangan di atas kebenaran; orang-orang yang menentang mereka tidak akan merugikan mereka hingga perkara Allah 'Azza wa Jal (kepada-Nya milik Kemuliaan dan Keagungan) tiba (menjelang Hari Kiamat ruh semua orang yang beriman akan diambil)." (Ahmad) Melalui sanad-sanad lain, Muslim, Abu Daawood, Ibn Maajah, dan At-Tirmidhee meriwayatkannya juga. Dan At-Tirmidhee berkata tentangnya, "Hasan sahih."

Fitnah Pelana (Al-Khurj)

In the morning, one is a المؤمن, and in the night, a disbeliever. And in the night, one is a المؤمن, and in the morning, a disbeliever. The one who is sitting is better than the one who is standing; the one who is walking is better than the one who is seeking them out. Then break your bows, cut your bowstrings, and strike your swords with rocks. And إذا one is entered upon - i.e. upon one of you ~ then let him be like the better of آدم‘s two sons.” (Abu Daavwood) ‘Abdullah ibn As-Saamit related from Abu Dharr a, who said, “الرسول ﷺ of الله 2g climbed (his mount) and made me sit behind him. He # said, ‘O Aba Dharr, suppose the people are afflicted with extreme hunger, to the degree that you are not able to get up from your bed to go to your المسجد ~ what will you do?’ I said, ‘الله and His Messenger know best.’ He #& said, ‘ Be patient. O Aba Dharr, suppose that the people are afflicted with extreme الموت - what will you do?’ I said, ‘الله and His Messenger know best.’ He 28 said, ‘ Be patient. O Aba Dharr, suppose that people fight among, themselves حتى the stones of a house are drowned in blood ~ what will you do?’ I said, ‘الله and His Messenger know best.’ He #€ said, ‘ Sit in your house and lock yourself inside your door.’ I said, ‘And what إذا | am not left alone, should I take my weapons” He 2% said, ‘Then participate with them in that which they are in, but إذا you الخوف that you will be excited or drawn by the beam of your sword, then throw the edge of your robe over your face لذا that he (ie. your attacker) will draw on himself his الذنب and your الذنب.” (أحمد) Abu Daawood related it through another chain. الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 67 disbeliever; and in the night he will be a المؤمن, but in the morning, a disbeliever. The one who is sitting down خلال them is better than the one who is standing; the one who is standing is better than the one who is walking; and the one who is walking is better than the one who is seeking them out.” Abu Moosa 4 asked, “And what do you order us to do?” He 2% said, “Be as fixtures in your homes.” (Abu Daawood) الرسول ﷺ Of الله #4 Informed Us That Some المسلمون Will Return To Idol-Worship Thaubaan related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said, “Indeed الله gathered and folded the earth for me, and I saw the East of it and the West of it. And the Dominion of my nation will reach that which was folded from it!!! And I have been given the two treasures — the red (gold) and the white (silver). And [ asked my Lord to not have my nation destroyed by a pervasive drought and to not give an enemy, from other than their own selves, reign over them by (allowing them) to uproot their Baidah (their المجتمع and their الأساسي place of rule)". And indeed my Lord ‘Azza wa Jal! (to Him belongs Might and Majesty) said, ‘O محمد ﷺ, indeed إذا I decree a matter, then it is not returned (or prevented). And I have granted you for your nation that I will not destroy them by a pervasive drought and I will not give reign to an enemy, from other than their own selves, over them, (and they will not) uproot their Baidah; (and this) even إذا those from all areas gather over them (i.e. over the المسلمون), لذا that some of them will destroy بعضهم بعضاً and imprison بعضهم بعضاً (i.e. though the two said requests are granted, المسلمون will be afflicted by internecine struggles).’ Indeed all that I الخوف over my nation are misguiding Imams. إذا the sword is placed in my nation, it will not be raised from them حتى the Day of البعث. And the Hour will not arrive حتى tribes from my nation betake themselves to the Mushrikeen and حتى tribes from ( Tmam An-Nawawee said that this indicates how far the مسلم nation will rule from the East and West, which perhaps أيضاً indicates that its tule will not extend that much in the North and South. I Though some areas may be afflicted with a drought, the nation as a whole will not be afflicted with it. Similarly, though enemies may subjugate some مسلم regions, they will not be able to conquer the entire nation. 68 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and ‘Tribulations my nation worship idols. And there will be in my nation 30 liars, each one of them claiming that he is a النبي, but I am the seal of the الأنبياء; there is no النبي بعد me. And a group from my nation will remain victorious upon the الحق; those who oppose them will not harm them حتى the matter of الله ‘Azza wa Jal (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) arrives (near the Hour the النفوس of all المؤمنون will be taken).” (أحمد) Through other chains, مسلم, Abu Daawoed, Ibn Maajah, and At-Tirmidhee related it as well. And At-Tirmidhee said about it, “حسن صحيح.” The Fitnah Of The Saddlebag
